category_sources: source_facts.description identifies GNU Binutils for x86_64-linux-gnu cross development; official Binutils docs cover assembler, linker, and binary tools.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is x86_64-linux-gnu-binutils; source_facts.description identifies GNU Binutils for x86_64-linux-gnu cross development.
docs_sources: Official Sourceware Binutils documentation page lists the manuals included in Binutils sources.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GNU Binutils page gives the development source tree as sourceware.org/git/binutils-gdb.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables include ar, as, ld, objcopy, objdump, readelf, and strip; source_facts.description states GNU Binutils cross development.
